*Plots to make*

*When districts were used for matching*
2001 Only data.
[ ] Event Study plot for crude coefficients between men and women.
[ ] Event Study plot for percentage penalty metrics between men and women.

2011 Data.
[ ] Event Study plot for crude coefficients between men and women.
[ ] Event Study plot for percentage penalty metrics between men and women.

Joint Data.
[ ] Event Study plot for crude coefficients between men and women.
[ ] Event Study plot for percentage penalty metrics between men and women.


*When districts are not used for matching*

Joint Data
[ ] Event Study plot for crude coefficients between men and women.
[ ] Event Study plot for percentage penalty metrics between men and women.
